name: Social Status: Life Simulator
short_description: Social Status is a fast-paced online co-op survival game. Explore an open world, work jobs and particapte in online events to improve your chances of survival. Take as much loot and resources as you can carry to get ahead quickly, level up, then buy the things you have always dreamed of.
detailed_description:
Social status is a game of survival. Use your instincts and tactic to get ahead of the competition and see unlimited wealth.

Don't forget your character vitals like food, water, sleep and toilet usage. If you let these indicators get low you will perish and loose everything.

Gather resources from the open world to create a life of your dreams. Up to 4 players online, work cooperatively with friends or go at it alone.

KEY FEATURES:

- open world survival mechanics

- crafting

- weapons, guns, equipment

- PVE online events as a cop or as a criminal

- become a criminal or become a cop or do both!

- find jobs, careers and other sources of income in the world around you

- socialize in the town tavern

- lease a house or buy land and build your own house

- buy a car or steal a car. Use it to get around the world faster

- interact and/or text chat with other players

- customize your character with lots of different clothing and accessory options

Social Status is best played online with other players. However, it can be played offline where necessary.
